start.welcome:
🤖 NEXUS AI v2.1

Elige una opción:
onboarding.welcome:
👋 Welcome to NEXUS AI!

I'm your all-in-one AI assistant powered by Google Gemini 2.0 Flash — completely FREE!
onboarding.features:
✨ Here's what I can do:

🤖 **Smart Chat** — Conversations with AI
🎨 **Image Generation** — Create AI artwork
🔊 **Voice** — Text-to-speech & speech-to-text
☁️ **Cloud Storage** — Upload & manage files
🔗 **Referral** — Invite friends
🎮 **Games** — Quiz, Wordle, and more
onboarding.try_ai: 👇 Try one of these to get started:
onboarding.ai_hint:
💡 *Quick tip:* Just type any message and I'll respond with AI!

You can also use:
• `/ask <question>` — Quick Q&A
• `/code <code>` — Code review
• `/translate <text>` — Smart translation
onboarding.image_hint:
💡 *Quick tip:* Use `/image <description>` to generate images!

Try: `/image a cat in space digital-art`

Styles: realistic, anime, digital-art, oil-painting, pixel-art, watercolor, cyberpunk, fantasy, 3d, sketch
onboarding.go_chat: 💬 Send any message to start chatting!
onboarding.explore_hint:
🗺️ **All Commands:**

🤖 `/ai` — Chat with Gemini
🎨 `/image` — Generate images
🔊 `/tts` — Text to speech
☁️ `/cloud` — Upload files
🔗 `/referral` — Invite friends
🎮 `/quiz` — Play games
🌐 `/language` — Change language
❓ `/help` — Full command list
